Scenario.title: ArcaneDoor: Phishing-Driven Disruption in Energy Sector
Scenario.overview: Energy Simple A basic-skilled threat group named ArcaneDoor initiates a targeted attack against energy sector organizations through phishing, leading to system compromise and operational disruption.
Scenario.attack_surface: AVAILABLE_SURFACES: Internet-facing assets, Malicious Payload, OS Process
Scenario.attack_vector: AVAILABLE_VECTORS: Delivery Method, Command and Scripting Interpreter, Data Manipulation

stage.name: Initial Access
stage.description: The attacker deploys phishing emails containing malicious links or attachments to compromise employee devices. These emails exploit human error to gain initial access to internet-facing assets.

stage.name: Execution
stage.description: After compromising a device, the attacker executes malicious scripts on the victim's system to establish command-and-control communication and escalate privileges.

stage.name: Impact
stage.description: The attacker alters system configurations or operational data through manipulated inputs, disrupting energy infrastructure operations and causing potential service outages.

Scenario.summary: ArcaneDoor leverages phishing to infiltrate energy sector networks, executes malicious scripts to maintain control, and manipulates critical systems to disrupt operations. The attack chain demonstrates basic sophistication focused on human error and system exploitation.
